refId.description: Unique identification generated by the transaction originator using UUID logic to unambiguously link a request and response message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request initiation by the originator in the format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss:mmm+hh:mm'. The value of '+hh:mm' portion should always be '-05:00' or '-06:00' reflecting CST time.

icaNumber.description: ICA number of the Issuer or Acquirer or Provider initiating the fraud submission request.
